textByHash.2c92fe034da307039fd8ed858e53f01e6e09193e: I wonder what Emelio has cooked up this time.
textByHash.15ff85c129f0ad811dfdbe5dbf9f7c0c7eb72159: The sauce is essential. You want there to be as much sauce as there is spice and salad combined.
textByHash.b0ee792ca297d22de6276f3832beab6c6294312d: I think Emelio might actually be on for a winner this time.* (End of dialogue)
